test.command: bun run test (vitest for backend) + bun run test:frontend (jest for frontend)
test.notes: Backend: 42 passed, 71 skipped (DB-dependent). Frontend: 125 passed. Two pre-existing test env issues with vitest picking up React Native tests.

lint.notes: 10 warnings about 'any' types in test mock functions (non-blocking)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding a note that frontend tests (src/**/*.test.{ts,tsx}) must be run via `bun run test:frontend` (Jest), not `bun test` (Bun's native runner which conflicts with React Native's Flow syntax). The current documentation already has separate commands but could explicitly mention this limitation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Two frontend test files (auth-client.test.ts, ErrorBoundary.test.tsx) fail with 'Unexpected typeof' when run via bun test but pass via jest

rejectedObservations.observation: Two separate test runners are used - vitest for backend and Jest for frontend
Service files in knip.json ignoreFiles because exports are planned for future use
rejectedObservations.reason: configuration already handles this correctly, no action needed
